prompt: A loose watercolor-and-ink anime illustration of a youthful male idol styled as a pancake angel taking a selfie inside a trendy café. He is centered in a close, slightly wide-angle selfie composition with one arm reaching toward the viewer from the left foreground, creating a casual fan-service snapshot feel. He has messy short blond hair and a soft, pretty-boy look, with large white angel wings spreading behind him. On top of his head sits a whimsical stack of golden pancakes with syrup and a square of butter like a halo. He wears an oversized white T-shirt printed with the words PANCAKE TENSHI and a pancake illustration, plus a thin necklace with a small star charm. The mood is cheerful, dreamy, and slightly idol-like. A hand-drawn speech bubble near his head contains the Japanese text 今日もふわふわ〜♪ パンケーキパワー！. The café interior behind him is bright and sketchy, with a blackboard sign reading CAFE Pancake Heaven, shelves and windows on the left, and 2 background idol performers on the right holding microphones on a tiny stage under hanging lights. In the foreground, show 3 plated or served pancake-themed items: one small decorated pancake dessert with whipped cream and berries at bottom left, one cropped pancake plate at bottom center, and one iced drink in a plastic cup at bottom right labeled TENSHI CAFE with a tiny wing icon. Add hand-drawn doodles, tiny hearts, sparkles, and handwritten Japanese menu notes around the food, including a small “Set List” card at the lower right. Use expressive pencil lines, soft beige and honey tones, white highlights, slightly messy café sketchbook energy, and charming editorial illustration quality.
